brief: Tensions escalate as US and Iran exchange strikes near a nuclear plant, while Ukraine intensifies attacks on Russian ships near Crimea. A factory fire in China kills 28, and research on visualization and AI for sign language and cultural heritage is highlighted.
news_summary: US-Iran strikes near Bushehr nuclear plant and steep fall in Hormuz ship crossings mark heightened Middle East tensions; Ukraine hits Russian ships near Crimea. A factory fire in China's 'shoe capital' kills 28, and a former Olympian pleads not guilty in Washington reflecting pool vandalism case.
papers_summary: New HCI research explores performance-based incentives in visualization, clinical translation of brain-computer interfaces in China, and a smart glove for sign language recognition. Two papers focus on computational analysis of traditional Chinese paintings.

en.brief: Tensions escalate as US and Iran exchange strikes near a nuclear plant, while Ukraine intensifies attacks on Russian ships near Crimea. A factory fire in China kills 28, and research on visualization and AI for sign language and cultural heritage is highlighted.
en.news_summary: US-Iran strikes near Bushehr nuclear plant and steep fall in Hormuz ship crossings mark heightened Middle East tensions; Ukraine hits Russian ships near Crimea. A factory fire in China's 'shoe capital' kills 28, and a former Olympian pleads not guilty in Washington reflecting pool vandalism case.
en.papers_summary: New HCI research explores performance-based incentives in visualization, clinical translation of brain-computer interfaces in China, and a smart glove for sign language recognition. Two papers focus on computational analysis of traditional Chinese paintings.

zh.brief: 广西洪灾、澳门国安法首案、台湾毒油事件占据头条，同时德国华人性侵案引发跨境犯罪讨论。学术方面，脑机接口和中国画分析研究有进展。
zh.news_summary: 广西洪灾预警失效致民众措手不及；澳门前议员欧锦新被诉颠覆罪面临25年徒刑；德国Telegram群组涉跨國迷姦案；台湾毒油因抽验漏洞扩散全台。
zh.papers_summary: 脑机接口在中国的临床试验转化研究，以及基于构图图分析的中国传统绘画可视分析系统，是今日论文亮点。

todays_image.caption: Lobophora sp.'s drifting, fragile form mirrors the fleeting truce now "over" as Iran reports a US attack near a nuclear plant.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
